title: Clean room wipe mop head unit
abstract: A mop head unit (10) that can be used for cleaning multiple surface types. The mop head unit is disposable and incorporates a mop head frame (12) with a plurality of inflatable air chambers (16) and a cleaning pad/wipe (14). The mop head frame and the cleaning pad/wipe are incorporated into a single mop head unit. The mop head unit may be used wet or dry.
claims: Claims What is claimed is: 1. A mop head unit (10), comprising: an inflatable mop head frame (12) comprising a plurality of inflatable air chambers (16); and a cleaning pad (14) integrally attached to the mop head frame. 2. The unit of claim 1, wherein the inflatable mop head is provided in an inflated state. 3. The unit of claim 1, wherein the inflatable mop head is provided in a deflated state, such that a user inflates the inflatable mop head with a pump prior to use. 4. The unit of claim 3, wherein the pump is a separately provided pump. 5. The unit of claim 3, wherein the pump is incorporated into a handle shaft. 6. The unit of any of the preceding claims, wherein the inflatable mop head comprises vinyl, polyvinyl chloride, polypropylene, various types of polyethylenes, blow-molded plastics, thermoplastic polyurethane, or any combination thereof. 7. The unit of any of the preceding claims, wherein the cleaning pad comprises a thin membrane of functional fabric, a nonwoven material, a knit material, a quilted material, a needled material, a woven material, a textile material, a microfiber material, a foam material, a polymeric material, or any combination thereof. 8. The unit of any of the preceding claims, further comprising an intermediate layer (22) for absorption or solution application. 9. The unit of any of the preceding claims, wherein the plurality of inflatable air chambers (16) define a first bladder and further comprising a second bladder or core component (24) enclosing a cleaning/chemical solution. 10. The unit of claim 9, wherein inflation of the first bladder causes the second bladder to burst, releasing the cleaning/chemical solution. 11. The unit of any of the preceding claims, wherein the cleaning pad comprises one or more pockets (30) configured to receive arms (32) of a mop handle. 12. A cleaning implement, comprising: the mop head unit (10) of claim 1; and a handle. 13. The implement of claim 12, wherein the handle comprises hingeable arms (32) along a handle shaft (36). 14. The implement of claims 12 or 13, wherein the handle comprises a head (40) configured to be received by the mop head unit (10) and a pump (44) configured to inflate the plurality of inflatable air chambers (16) of the mop head unit.
